change_control.policy: Any weight change requires explicit changelog entry in beacn-drep-soul/CHANGELOG.md and doctrine commit review.

notes: These weights are consumed by beacn-drep-core at runtime; the core must fail closed if this file is missing or invalid.
Treasury concentration and milestone penalties are doctrine-derived from treasury_spending_doctrine.json scoring_adjustments.
Threshold values for final YES/NO/ABSTAIN routing remain in engine policy and are auditable in source.

drep_margin_cap was reduced from 0.45 to 0.10 in v1.1.0 so the network DRep distribution can INFORM but never by itself DETERMINE a directional vote: the cap (0.10) is below the non-treasury directional threshold (0.12), so network consensus alone cannot push a neutral action across the YES/NO line. This enforces README principle 14 ('do not optimize for popularity, social pressure, or delegation size') and values_hierarchy.md rank 5 ('social consensus momentum' is the lowest-priority value). BEACN's own evidence-based penalties/bonuses must carry any directional call.
